projects.name: Agentic Workflow Platform
projects.description: Built and deployed single-task and multi-agent workflows to execute dynamic business logic and orchestrate complex system interactions. Developed reusable agents and context-aware conversational systems for generative UI.

projects.name: Declarative Templating Engine
projects.description: Developed a configuration-driven data pipeline system with LLM-based config generation and Kafka-powered event-driven architecture for loosely coupled systems.

projects.name: Quotes and Rates Platform
projects.description: Built a platform for aggregating cargo transport rates and generating quotations. Optimized XML processing pipeline, reducing memory usage by ~96%. Implemented observability and CI/CD deployment pipelines.

projects.name: Workflow Builder Framework
projects.description: Designed a template-driven framework to manage shipment integrations and accounts payable workflows with customizable data pipelines.

projects.name: Automation Pipelines & Monitoring
projects.description: Built automation pipelines and cron jobs for system administration and server health reporting.

projects.name: CMS Admin Portal
projects.description: Developed an admin and user management portal for a CMS backend and deployed it on Azure VM.

projects.name: Headless CMS Backend
projects.description: Built backend services for a headless CMS platform and deployed as serverless functions using AWS Lambda.
